ddls:
CREATE TABLE "plugins" (
  "plugin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plugin */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the plugin */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plugin */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the plugin */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the plugin */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the plugin */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the plugin was installed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the plugin */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the plugin is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plugin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plugin_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "plugin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plugin the setting belongs to */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the setting is the default setting */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modified date of the setting */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plugin_settings_plugin_id FOREIGN KEY ("plugin_id") REFERENCES plugins ("plugin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skins" (
  "skin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skin */,
  "skin_name" TEXT /* Name of the skin */,
  "skin_description" TEXT /* Description of the skin */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the skin */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the skin is the default skin */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the skin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "view_modes" (
  "view_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view mode */,
  "view_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the view mode */,
  "view_mode_description" TEXT /* Description of the view mode */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the view mode is the default view mode */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the view mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sort_methods" (
  "sort_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sort method */,
  "sort_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the sort method */,
  "sort_method_description" TEXT /* Description of the sort method */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sort method is the default sort method */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the sort method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sort_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the view */,
  "view_name" TEXT /* Name of the view */,
  "view_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the view mode used in the view */,
  "sort_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sort method used in the view */,
  "skin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skin used in the view */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the view is the default view for the user */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modified date of the view */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the view */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_views_sort_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("sort_method_id") REFERENCES sort_methods ("sort_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_views_skin_id FOREIGN KEY ("skin_id") REFERENCES skins ("skin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_views_view_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("view_mode_id") REFERENCES view_modes ("view_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_plugins" (
  "user_plugin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-plugin association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uses the plugin */,
  "plugin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plugin used by the user */,
  "plugin_setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plugin setting used by the user */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the plugin is the default plugin for the user */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modified date of the user-plugin association */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Usage count of the plugin by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_plugin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_plugins_plugin_id FOREIGN KEY ("plugin_id") REFERENCES plugins ("plugin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_plugins_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_plugins_plugin_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("plugin_setting_id") REFERENCES plugin_settings ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, power user, regular user) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, banned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
